name: AskJeles
description: Jeles, your local-first AI librarian. Search Willow/Binder first, then open web, maps, and Special Collections; build topic quizzes and optional session-consented learning events.
author: Sean Campbell

data_streams.purpose: Process your search queries against local KB, open web, maps, and institutional sources
data_streams.description: Queries cleared when session ends — not stored or used for training

data_streams.purpose: Save search findings to your local Binder
data_streams.description: Only deposited if you explicitly choose to save — stored in local Binder database

data_streams.purpose: Capture small learning-event summaries for later pedagogical review
data_streams.description: Off by default. Only captured for the current session after Ctrl+L consent; resets when the app closes.

dev_server.note: Also requires --serve flag. Local development only. Not started in production.

notes: network_read is used for local search handoffs, open-web lookup, maps, and institutional source fetches. binder_write deposits findings into the local Binder only when the user saves. learning_events are off by default and session-consented with Ctrl+L.
